allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('demo.html', 'utf8'\); const scriptMatch = html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if \(scriptMatch\) { try { new Function\(scriptMatch[1]\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', e.message\); } }")
